calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jul-16-2009 Vacated

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-16-2009 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Pro Tem: Barbara Anscher, Clerk: Felicia Green, Not Reported. (Dept. 218)

Appearances:
Plaintiff Pravin Patel is present.
No attorney appearing for the plaintiff.

Defendant, Kevin Walsh is present.
Attorney, Nathaniel Bruno representing the defendant through limited scope.

This matter comes on calendar for an Unlawful Detainer Settlement Conference. The Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer privately for settlement discussions.

The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed. See scanned document for the settlement terms contained in the signed agreement for the premises located on 710 Ellis Street, #31A, San Francisco, CA 94109.

This case settled, the trial date of JUL-20-2009 is vacated.
